className.formula: 'flex items-center justify-center w-[32px] h-[32px] min-w-[32px] min-h-[32px] rounded-[9999px] overflow-hidden shrink-0 ' + ((auth?.user || collections['b8c9d0e1-f2a3-4567-bcde-678901234567']?.data?.activeOrder?.customer?.emailAddress) ? 'bg-green-500 !text-white' : (variables['d9e0f1a2-b3c4-5678-defa-789012345678'] === 'contact' ? 'bg-[var(--theme-primary)] !text-white' : 'bg-[var(--theme-muted)] !text-[var(--theme-muted-foreground)]'))

props.className: bg-[var(--theme-primary)] text-white hover:bg-[var(--theme-primary)] flex flex-row items-center justify-center py-[12px] px-[16px] rounded-[6px]

className.formula: 'flex flex-row items-center justify-between w-full py-[16px] ' + ((auth?.user || collections['b8c9d0e1-f2a3-4567-bcde-678901234567']?.data?.activeOrder?.customer?.emailAddress) ? '' : 'opacity-50 pointer-events-none cursor-not-allowed')

props.className: flex flex-row items-center gap-[12px] flex-1 min-w-0

className.formula: 'flex items-center justify-center w-[32px] h-[32px] min-w-[32px] min-h-[32px] rounded-[9999px] overflow-hidden shrink-0 ' + (collections['b8c9d0e1-f2a3-4567-bcde-678901234567']?.data?.activeOrder?.shippingAddress?.streetLine1 ? 'bg-green-500 !text-white' : (variables['d9e0f1a2-b3c4-5678-defa-789012345678'] === 'shipping' ? 'bg-[var(--theme-primary)] !text-white' : 'bg-[var(--theme-muted)] !text-[var(--theme-muted-foreground)]'))

'' : 'opacity-50 pointer-events-none cursor-not-allowed')

props.className: flex flex-row items-center gap-[12px] flex-1 min-w-0

'bg-[var(--theme-primary)] !text-white' : 'bg-[var(--theme-muted)] !text-[var(--theme-muted-foreground)]'))
